evidence.text: Great tactics this Just Culture, from my point of view. But given that failure is norm, particularly when you are building sth new; that people tend tu build up their experience just because we don’t really recall what really happened after a few hours of taking the wrong decision; that people usually tend to repeat at least twice the same mistake before acknowledging they maybe wrong; and that the situation is not really repeating itself in the future, I’m wondering:
